wishlist_intro: Characters the community wants added most. Vote for your favourites, highly-supported requests go to the top of the admin review queue. Got someone in mind? Submit a suggestion.
submit_intro: Know a real historical or public figure who belongs in the gacha pool? Search their Wikipedia article below. If they're already in the game you'll see it instantly, otherwise submit them for community upvote and admin review.
landing_tagline: A CCP-themed Discord bot that scores every message, assigns Party ranks, runs a live economy, fields a gacha bureau of historical figures, current celebrities, and powers a Beijing Stock Exchange, all inside your server.
